channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter bin overflowing, 6th July
item.description:
Waste Bin on pathway a bottom of T GREEN between Bastion Road and Rutherglen Road needs emptying.waste is now spreading across the pathway. These bins need emptying weekly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Washing machine, 6th July
item.description:
Washing machine dumped behind 2 Old Dover Rd
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Dover Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van, 6th July
item.description:
This van has been parked in the road for over a week - it doesn’t belong to the neighbours - I believe it has been abandoned - the drivers mirror has been damaged

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 450, Hurst Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overhanging and causing detritus to fall on public footpath and neighbouring gardens, 6th July
item.description:
Tree has grown too large for its location and is causing damage to neighbouring gardens and danger to footpath users.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Hill Close, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Along pavement and around tree on the corner of waterloo passage and burton road, 6th July
item.description:
Number 8 burton road have been dumping their rubbish again. apparently they have permission from the council to keep doing this. why are they never punished?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Overgrown trees bushes in park encroaching into gardens, 6th July
item.description:
The bushes planted in the park that back onto Kent Road are so overgrown and tall they effect the light into house ruin the sheds and deckings and are unmanageable by home owners and tenants The bushes are creeping into the actual gardens overhang into gardens all the way along Kent Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish outside of empty bin, 6th July
item.description:
Old rubbish was cleared yesterday/this morning and there’s already new rubbish next to the bin on the pavement again. The bin is not placed well as it’s now encouraging excessive fly tipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pembury Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bloking the garage access, 6th July
item.description:
This car has been blocking the access for garages for a few days. This car doesn't belong to any of the goodrich house residents.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vartry Road, Tottenham, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign has been cut down, 6th July
item.description:
Sign has been cut down

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayne Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped rubbish, 6th July
item.description:
Flytipped rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hawksbrook Lane, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 6th July
item.description:
Fly tipping of garden waste and gas canisters by the residence of 26 gosPatrick Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gospatrick Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip at top of ceres road, 6th July
item.description:
Fly tip that keeps growing. Hasn’t been collected in weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Nicholas Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 6th July
item.description:
This is an ongoing issue, our tax money is being wasted because efforts to solve the problem lack real depth or focus on symptoms whilst also having no effective way of educating and incentivising good behaviour in addition to no effective way to penalise bad behaviour.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Majendie Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large plastic item in packaging left under bridge, 6th July
item.description:
Someone had dumped this large piece of rubbish in a residential area. Has been there for about 3 days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southill Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 6th July
item.description:
This is an ongoing issue, our tax money is being wasted because efforts to solve the problem lack real depth or focus on symptoms whilst also having no effective way of educating and incentivising good behaviour in addition to no effective way to penalise bad behaviour.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Majendie Road, Plumstead

item.title: Fly tip, 6th July
item.description:
Fly tip varios wooden items plus a large plastic container !!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Samuel Street, Woolwich

item.title: Fly Tipping, 6th July
item.description:
This is an ongoing issue, our tax money is being wasted because efforts to solve the problem lack real depth or focus on symptoms whilst also having no effective way of educating and incentivising good behaviour in addition to no effective way to penalise bad behaviour.

item.title: Sofa left on pavement, 6th July
item.description:
Fly tipping/ sofa

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marlborough Avenue, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped vehicle, 6th July
item.description:
This vehicle has been dumped in the road for the last 6 weeks on and off. Hasn't moved once and did receive a parking fine for having no permit. It is parked in a permit control zone which is not being checked. Parked in such an awkward place and preventing residents with permits from parking. Makes it hard to turn in the cul de sac as it is such a long vehicle.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Throwley Close, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping., 6th July
item.description:
This fly tipping has been on the corner of the alleyway leading to Creasy Court, just off Raglan Avenue, EN8 on corner outside number 27 Raglan Avenue, its been there since the weekend and since then people have added to it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Raglan Avenue, Waltham Cross, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet
